title: Product Catalog loads homepage with categories and product grid
description: Verifies the homepage renders primary catalog browsing content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify category filters are displayed
Verify a grid of product cards is displayed

title: Filter products by category
description: Verifies selecting a category filter updates the product grid contents.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a category filter tab
Verify the product grid updates to show products for the selected category

title: Add a product to cart from a product card
description: Verifies adding an item from the catalog shows confirmation and updates cart badge.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the add-to-cart action on a product card
Verify a toast confirmation is visible
Verify the floating cart badge increments

title: Category with no active products shows empty state
description: Verifies the catalog displays an empty-state message when a selected category has no active products.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click category filter tabs until you find a category that results in no available products
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no product cards are displayed in the grid

title: Out-of-stock product cannot be added to cart
description: Verifies an out-of-stock product shows an out-of-stock state and prevents adding to cart.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll until an out-of-stock product card is visible
Attempt to add the out-of-stock product to the cart
Verify an error toast indicating the product is out of stock is visible
Verify the floating cart badge does not increment

title: Shopping Cart page shows items, quantity controls, and order summary
description: Verifies the cart page displays cart contents and the order summary when items exist.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the add-to-cart action on a product card
Navigate to /cart
Verify a list of cart items with quantity controls is displayed
Verify an order summary with a subtotal is displayed

title: Increase cart item quantity updates item subtotal and cart subtotal
description: Verifies incrementing quantity updates pricing in real time and proceeds to checkout.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the add-to-cart action on a product card
Navigate to /cart
Click the increase-quantity control for the cart item
Click the proceed-to-checkout action
Verify the user lands on the checkout page

title: Decreasing quantity below 1 removes item and updates cart badge
description: Verifies reducing quantity removes the item and updates totals and cart indicator.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the add-to-cart action on a product card
Navigate to /cart
Click the decrease-quantity control until the item is removed from the cart
Verify the cart items list no longer contains the removed item
Verify the floating cart badge reflects the updated item count

title: Empty cart shows empty state and checkout is disabled
description: Verifies the cart page empty state is shown and checkout cannot be started when there are no items.

steps.description: Navigate to /
If the floating cart badge indicates items are present, navigate to /cart and remove items until the cart is empty
Navigate to /cart
Verify an empty cart message is visible
Verify the proceed-to-checkout action is disabled

title: Checkout delivery flow submits to WhatsApp and clears cart
description: Verifies a delivery checkout can be completed through WhatsApp redirection and that the cart is cleared afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the add-to-cart action on a product card
Navigate to /checkout
Fill in the name field with Test Customer
Fill in the phone number field with 1122334455
Select delivery type Delivery
Type a valid address into the address autocomplete field
Select an address suggestion
Select a payment method that does not require extra fields
Submit the order via WhatsApp
Verify the browser navigates to a wa.me page with a prefilled message
Verify the cart is cleared when returning to the cart page

title: Checkout pickup flow hides address/map and uses zero shipping
description: Verifies pickup selection removes address inputs and sets shipping to zero in the order summary.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the add-to-cart action on a product card
Navigate to /checkout
Select delivery type Pickup (Retiro)
Fill in the name field with Test Customer
Fill in the phone number field with 1122334455
Select a payment method that does not require extra fields
Verify the address and map inputs are not displayed
Verify the order summary shows shipping cost as $0

title: Checkout validates missing phone number and blocks submission
description: Verifies inline validation prevents submitting an order when the phone field is empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the add-to-cart action on a product card
Navigate to /checkout
Fill in the name field with Test Customer
Ensure the phone number field is empty
Submit the order via WhatsApp
Verify an inline validation error is visible on the phone field
Verify the browser does not navigate to a wa.me page

title: Admin login redirects to dashboard with valid credentials
description: Verifies an admin can sign in with email/password and is redirected to the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the admin dashboard

title: Admin login shows error on invalid credentials and stays on login
description: Verifies invalid email/password shows an error toast and does not navigate away from the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill invalid-admin@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an error toast is visible
Verify the user remains on the admin login page

title: Admin dashboard displays primary KPI and activity content
description: Verifies the admin dashboard loads and shows KPI cards, sales charts, and recent orders.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Verify KPI cards are displayed
Verify sales charts and a recent orders list are displayed

title: Admin dashboard sidebar navigation to products works
description: Verifies the admin can navigate from dashboard to product management using the sidebar.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Click the sidebar link to the products section
Verify the admin products page is displayed

title: Unauthenticated access to dashboard redirects to admin login
description: Verifies visiting the admin dashboard without being authenticated redirects to the admin login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Verify the user lands on the admin login page

title: Admin products page loads and shows product listing
description: Verifies the product management page loads and displays a table/list of products.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/products
Verify a product table or list is displayed

title: Create a new product and verify it appears in the table
description: Verifies creating a product via the new product form shows success and the product appears in the listing.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/products
Open the create new product flow
Fill Test Product 12345 into the product name field
Select a valid category in the category selector
Fill 1234 into the price field
Submit the create product form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify Test Product 12345 appears in the products table

title: Edit an existing product and verify updated data is shown
description: Verifies editing a product updates its details and the updated value is visible in the listing.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/products
Open edit for the first product in the list
Fill Updated Product Name 67890 into the product name field
Submit the edit product form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify Updated Product Name 67890 appears in the products table

title: Inline price edit updates the product price in the table
description: Verifies updating a product price via inline editing reflects the new price in the table.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/products
Start inline editing on the price cell for the first product
Fill 1999 into the inline price editor
Confirm the inline price change
Verify the first product shows price 1999 in the table

title: Create product form validates required fields and prevents submission
description: Verifies submitting the create product form with missing required fields shows validation errors and does not create a product.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/products
Open the create new product flow
Clear the product name field
Submit the create product form
Verify inline validation errors are visible
Verify the create product form remains open

title: Create a new category from the admin categories page
description: Verifies an admin can create a new category and see it appear in the categories list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to manage categories
Click the action to create a new category
Fill Category TC001 into the name field
Select a valid sort order value
Submit the category form
Verify Category TC001 appears in the categories list

title: Edit an existing category name and sort order
description: Verifies an admin can edit a category and see the updated values reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to manage categories
Click the action to create a new category
Fill Category TC002 Original into the name field
Select a valid sort order value
Submit the category form
Click edit for Category TC002 Original
Fill Category TC002 Updated into the name field
Select a different valid sort order value
Submit the category form
Verify Category TC002 Updated appears in the categories list

title: Change category ordering via sort order and confirm public category filter order updates
description: Verifies reordering categories in admin affects the order of category filters on the public homepage.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to manage categories
Click the action to create a new category
Fill Category TC003 A into the name field
Select a valid sort order value
Submit the category form
Click the action to create a new category
Fill Category TC003 B into the name field
Select a valid sort order value
Submit the category form
Click edit for Category TC003 A
Select a valid sort order value that places it after Category TC003 B
Submit the category form
Navigate to /
Verify the category filters show Category TC003 B before Category TC003 A

title: Attempt to delete a category that is constrained by existing products shows a clear outcome
description: Verifies the delete confirmation flow and that the UI shows either successful removal or a constraint error without leaving an ambiguous state.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to manage categories
Click delete on a category that appears to be in use
Confirm deletion
Verify either the category is removed from the list or a deletion constraint error is visible

title: Delete a newly created category
description: Verifies an admin can delete a category created within the test and it disappears from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to manage categories
Click the action to create a new category
Fill Category TC005 DeleteMe into the name field
Select a valid sort order value
Submit the category form
Click delete for Category TC005 DeleteMe
Confirm deletion
Verify Category TC005 DeleteMe no longer appears in the categories list

title: Create category validation: prevent save when name is empty
description: Verifies the category form enforces required name input and does not create a category with an empty name.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to manage categories
Click the action to create a new category
Fill  into the name field
Submit the category form
Verify a name validation error is visible

title: Categories page loads and displays the list of categories
description: Verifies the admin categories page renders its primary content (categories list) after login.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to manage categories
Verify a list of categories is displayed

title: Update operating hours and days and save settings
description: Verifies an admin can adjust operating hours and operating days and successfully save business settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/settings
Fill a valid opening time into the opening time field
Fill a valid closing time into the closing time field
Select at least one operating day
Save the settings
Verify a success confirmation toast is visible
Verify the updated opening and closing times are displayed

title: Pause orders with a custom message and block checkout
description: Verifies pausing orders from admin settings blocks checkout and displays the custom pause message to customers.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/settings
Toggle pause orders on
Fill in the pause message field with Pausado por mantenimiento QA
Save the settings
Navigate to /checkout
Verify the custom pause message Pausado por mantenimiento QA is displayed
Verify order submission is blocked

title: Validation: cannot save with no operating days selected
description: Verifies an inline validation error appears when attempting to save settings without any operating day selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/settings
Deselect all operating days
Save the settings
Verify an inline validation error is visible indicating at least one operating day is required

title: Configure WhatsApp business number and save
description: Verifies an admin can set the WhatsApp business number and save it successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/settings
Fill in the WhatsApp business number field with 5491112345678
Save the settings
Verify a success confirmation toast is visible
Verify the WhatsApp business number field shows 5491112345678

title: Pause orders without custom message still blocks checkout
description: Verifies pausing orders without entering a custom pause message still blocks order submission at checkout.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/settings
Toggle pause orders on
Clear the pause message field
Save the settings
Navigate to /checkout
Verify order submission is blocked
Verify a pause notice is displayed

title: Resume orders removes checkout block
description: Verifies resuming orders from admin settings allows checkout to proceed without pause blocking.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/settings
Toggle pause orders off
Save the settings
Navigate to /checkout
Verify the checkout form is available
Verify order submission is not blocked by a pause state

title: POS Caja - open cash register session and verify session status bar
description: Verifies opening a cash register session with an opening balance shows the session status bar.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/caja
Verify the page shows either an open session status bar OR a session open screen prompt
Verify Mostrador and Mesas tabs are visible if session is open

title: POS Mostrador - add products to cart and confirm order
description: Verifies adding products in Mostrador mode creates a pending order.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login and login with valid credentials
Navigate to /admin/caja
Click the Mostrador tab
Click a product card in the product grid to add it to the cart
Verify the cart shows the added product with quantity 1
Click Confirmar pedido button
Verify a pending order chip appears in the pending orders strip at the bottom

title: POS Mesas - table grid loads and shows table status
description: Verifies the Mesas tab shows the table grid with table cards.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login and login with valid credentials
Navigate to /admin/caja
Click the Mesas tab
Verify a grid of table cards is shown
Verify each table card shows a table number and status (libre or occupied)

title: POS Arqueos - session history page loads
description: Verifies the /admin/caja/arqueos page loads and shows session history.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login and login with valid credentials
Navigate to /admin/caja/arqueos
Verify the page loads with a table or list of past cash register sessions
Verify each session row shows opening balance, total sales and total orders columns

title: Admin orders - order list loads with status filter tabs
description: Verifies the orders management page loads with orders and status filter tabs.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login and login with valid credentials
Navigate to /admin/orders
Verify the page shows a list of orders
Verify status filter tabs are visible (abierto, recibido, pagado, etc.)
Click a status filter tab to filter orders
Verify the orders list updates to show only orders of that status

title: Admin ingredients - ingredient list loads
description: Verifies the ingredients management page loads and shows ingredients.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login and login with valid credentials
Navigate to /admin/ingredients
Verify the page shows a list of ingredients with name, unit and cost columns

title: Admin ingredients - create new ingredient
description: Verifies creating a new ingredient via the form.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login and login with valid credentials
Navigate to /admin/ingredients
Click Nueva ingrediente or New button
Fill Test Ingredient TC042 into the name field
Fill unit (e.g. kg) and cost per unit (e.g. 100)
Submit the form
Verify the new ingredient appears in the list

title: Admin recipes - recipe list loads
description: Verifies the recipes page loads showing recipe list with cost.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login and login with valid credentials
Navigate to /admin/recipes
Verify the page loads with a list of recipes showing recipe name and ingredient count or cost

title: Admin stock - stock dashboard loads with product levels
description: Verifies the stock page loads with product stock levels.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login and login with valid credentials
Navigate to /admin/stock
Verify the page shows stock levels for products
Verify there is a button or option to register a purchase

title: Admin tables - table configuration page loads
description: Verifies the restaurant tables configuration page loads.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login and login with valid credentials
Navigate to /admin/tables
Verify the page loads showing the list of configured tables
Verify there is a button to add a new table

title: Admin analytics - analytics dashboard loads with chart
description: Verifies the analytics page loads with sales chart.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login and login with valid credentials
Navigate to /admin/analytics
Verify the page loads with a sales chart or analytics data
Verify KPI cards or metrics are visible

title: Admin cocina - kitchen display loads with pending comandas
description: Verifies the kitchen display page loads showing pending orders.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login and login with valid credentials
Navigate to /admin/cocina
Verify the page loads with kitchen display content
Verify the page shows pending comandas or an empty state if no orders exist

title: Admin settings - business settings form loads and saves
description: Verifies the settings page loads with current values and can be saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login and login with valid credentials
Navigate to /admin/settings
Verify business settings form loads with fields (business name, WhatsApp number, etc.)
Click save without modifying values
Verify success toast or confirmation appears
